# Chapter 9: Human factors and operator error  (~100 pp)
- 9.1 The human as part of the system (12) · 9.2 Skill-based, rule-based, knowledge-based behaviour (Rasmussen) (15) · 9.3 Cognitive biases under stress (12) · 9.4 Mode confusion and automation surprises revisited from IX (15) · 9.5 Crew resource management (12) · 9.6 The myth of operator error and what it usually hides (15) · 9.7 Failure section (case): Air France 447, Eastern 401, Tenerife (19)

**Archetype**: interface, ethics, failure. **Project**: study one cockpit-voice-recorder transcript; identify points where intervention could have prevented the accident. **Exercises**: 20.
